## Summary

Describe the change in one short paragraph.

## Change class

- [ ] C0 editorial
- [ ] C1 local behavior
- [ ] C2 shared contract or policy
- [ ] C3 constitutional

## Artifact class

- [ ] charter
- [ ] contract
- [ ] operational
- [ ] evidence
- [ ] governance

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Evidence

State what was used to validate the change. If review was manual, say who performed it, what they reviewed, and what remains uncertain.

## AI involvement

State whether AI helped with drafting, analysis, review, or evaluation. Name the model or agent when known, and identify the human accountable reviewer.

## Risks

Describe any safety, governance, compatibility, or contributor-experience risks introduced by this change.

## Follow-up

List any follow-up issue, migration, or release-note work needed after merge.
